title: Definitions of OWWA, Placement Fees, and POEA
content:
(kk) OWWA - Overseas Workers Welfare Administration

(ll) Placement Fees - refer to any and all amounts charged by a private recruitment agency from a worker for its recruitment and placement services as prescribed by the Secretary of Labor and Employment.

(mm) POEA - Philippine Overseas Employment Administration, shall be used interchangeably with the term 'Administration'.

metadata.source_file: Omnibus IRR of RA 8042 as amended by RA 10022.pdf
